verbatim_anchor: the library needs to have everything I need at one place; not only are the excerpts self contained, but the library also is self contained
notes: Library-level self-containment. Captured in VISION.md + project_library_is_scholar_mind.md memory.

verbatim_anchor: Until there is no man walking this earth more knowledgeable than me concerning prayer
notes: Mastery ambition. Captured in user_personal_connection.md + STEERING.md.

verbatim_anchor: leaves only the human factor up to me; memorizing. Linking topics, aha moments, mappings, gathering of knowledge, ... is all done by the library
notes: Core UX principle: library does everything except memorization. Captured in user_study_pain.md memory.

verbatim_anchor: The library has recognized that الوضوء is actually part of الصلاة, regardless of the traditional structure scholars follow
notes: Revolutionary taxonomy vision. Captured in VISION.md taxonomy engine design. FP-4 prevents excerpting bias from this tree.

verbatim_anchor: I HATE LOOSE KNOWLEDGE. I HATE ATTENDING A LECTURE AND NOT GIVING EVERY PIECE OF KNOWLEDGE ITS PLACE
notes: ALL-CAPS Tier 1. Anti-loose-knowledge. Captured in project_library_is_scholar_mind.md. PLEASE marker present.

verbatim_anchor: I try to assign it locations in the wording themselves. Loosely memorizing is subject to dissapear
notes: Mnemonic study method. Captured in VISION.md study workflow section.

verbatim_anchor: the current focus is not on the ui, but on getting the pipeline to work reliabily
notes: Pipeline-first directive. Captured in CLAUDE.md Development Priority.

verbatim_anchor: did the pipeline make a mistake in excerpting? is the knowledge corrupted? 90% of my effort should go to memorizing
notes: Trust in pipeline = zero-worry study. 90/10 split: memorizing vs connections. Captured in user_study_pain.md.

verbatim_anchor: every single source of knowledge available on the internet should be integrated in it, because otherwise that would be a limit of knowledge
notes: Universal source integration vision. Captured in VISION.md source engine design.

verbatim_anchor: when I own the branch. When I'm it father. When I can replicate it from scratch
notes: Mastery definition: own, father, replicate. Captured in VISION.md study mastery criteria.

verbatim_anchor: Do not turn inferred structure into fixed doctrine unless I clearly said it
